## What & why

Briefly describe the change and the motivation.

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] No `.env` or secret values committed
- [ ] Conventional-commit style title (`feat:` / `fix:` / `docs:` …)
- [ ] CLA signed (first-time contributors)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/config changed

## Notes for reviewers

Anything that needs special attention (breaking changes, migrations, new envs).
